data.name: Hell's Bells
data.detailed_description:
Join the Community


關於此遊戲

Hell's Bells is a dark erotic visual novel steeped in ritual, devotion, and power.

Summoned by unknown whispers, you enter a long-forgotten chapel ruled by three Sisters who do not serve salvation. They offer something far more intimate.

Your choices shape devotion, dominance, surrender, and consequence.

Every vow has a cost. Every ritual leaves a mark.

Will you submit to revelation, or try to control what was never meant to be controlled?

FEATURES:

PARTAKE IN OCCULT RITUALS

Step beyond confession.

  • Perform branching ritual paths tied to each Sister

  • Unlock unique scenes based on obedience, defiance, or devotion

  • Unlock relics from rituals once completed

  • Discover multiple endings shaped by your choices

DEVOTION, DOMINANCE, AND POWER EXCHANGE

This story is about power.

  • Consentual domination and submission dynamics

  • Strong character driven dialogue

  • Ritualistic intimacy and escalating tension

  • Player shaped relationships with each Sister

A CHAPEL THAT WATCHES YOU BACK

The chapel never forgets.

  • A persistent progression system across routes

  • Unlockable relics and offerings

  • Hidden dialogue and layered lore

  • Reactive scenes that acknowledge your actions

THE BELLES ARE CALLING

The chapel doors did not open by accident.

Every choice you make draws you deeper into a malevolent world of devotion, temptation, and revelation. The Sisters each offer a different path, but none lead you back unchanged.

Truth is earned through ritual. Power demands surrender. And some vows cannot be taken back.

data.short_description: In a cathedral beneath Hell, three dominant Sisters await your submission. Choose your path, endure sacred punishment, and unlock forbidden scenes in this dark, stylized visual novel. Obedience isn’t asked for... it’s taken.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (2nd Gen) or AMD A6 equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics (Intel HD 4000 or equivalent)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound-compatible sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 (8th Gen) or AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with 1GB VRAM (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 950 or AMD Radeon R7 360)
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound-compatible sound card with surround support

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13 (High Sierra)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 (4th Gen) or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Intel Iris / HD Graphics 5000 or better
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: CoreAudio-compatible sound device
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 (Big Sur) or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 (8th Gen) or Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Apple M1 GPU or discrete AMD GPU
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: CoreAudio-compatible sound device

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or equivalent distribution
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (2nd Gen) or AMD A6 equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Intel HD 4000 or equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: ALSA- or PulseAudio-compatible sound device
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS or equivalent distribution
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 (5th Gen) or AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with 1 GB VRAM (NVIDIA GTX 950 / AMD Radeon R7 360 or better)
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: ALSA- or PulseAudio-compatible sound device

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3 (2nd Gen) or AMD A6 equivalent
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Integrated Graphics (Intel HD 4000 or equivalent)
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound-compatible sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 (8th Gen) or AMD Ryzen 5
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Dedicated GPU with 1GB VRAM (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 950 or AMD Radeon R7 360)
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound-compatible sound card with surround support

  • Sound Card: CoreAudio-compatible sound device
